charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1101_0100:
[Name:PlayerNickname ] spotted Diantha
and Korrina deep in conversation.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0300:
*giggle*
I suppose it looks odd that we’re both
wearing our arc suits.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0400:
Diantha and I were just chatting. We’re both
Trainers from Kalos, after all.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0500:
And we’re also Mega Evolution users who’ve
awakened our arc suits!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0700:
arc suits are a natural extension of one’s
relationship with their Pokémon.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0800:
They aren’t awakened by doing something
special or changing how one acts. What’s
important is the everyday relationship.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_0900:
That means anyone can awaken an arc suit,
as long as they have a strong bond with
their Pokémon!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_1100:
She’s always supported me—both as a
Champion and an actress.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_1200:
Gardevoir is a Pokémon said to unleash its
full power when protecting its Trainer.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_1300:
With a close bond, that power seems at
its max.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_1400:
I’m the same way. If it’s for Gardevoir, I can
give my utmost and become even stronger!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_1500:
Korrina, you and Lucario are like that too,
right?
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_0301_1700: I want to be like you two!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_0401_1800:
Don’t worry! I’m sure a sync pair like you
can do it!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_0402_2100: You two shine just as brightly, you know!
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_2200:
I hope to continue showcasing our bond,
both as a Champion and an actress.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_2300:
I’d be elated if others could see the deep
bond between people and Pokémon—and
the shine it brings to our lives.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_2500:
Is she worried about you, Diantha? Maybe
she’s trying to tell you not to overexert
yourself.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_2700: I won’t dash onto the stage alone.
charaepi_ch0158_90_carnet/2301_1201_2800:
We’ll move forward together every step
of the way, with an even more wonderful
shine!
